creator: m.r.sopacua@gmail.com
text:
Update to 1.8.1:
- Add additional patches issued post-release
- Stage support
- Removed option for MySQL patch now contained in the release
- Fix ./mage command by adding zlib to dependencies
- Closes ports/187985 (commit of 1.7 was incomplete)
- Adds option to support the REST Api.
- Adds option to activate redis session module (disabled by default).
- Rework cron.sh to do sane locking with lockf(1)
- Add example cron entry

Build archive:
<https://redports.org/buildarchive/20140419075501-2233/>

NOTE:
To build on redports QATty it needs line 129 of:
<https://redports.org/browser/melvyn/lang/php5/Makefile.ext?rev=25910>

and a bump to trigger rebuild of converters/php5-iconv.

Committer note:
Please trigger me on twitter (@mrsopacua) if something needs adjusting.

Fix: 

Patch is >1MB downloadable here:
<http://magemana.nl/ports/maintainer-update/magento-1.8.1.0/update.diff>
